---
title: "Teaching"
---

<div class="page">

# Teaching

## Courses Taught

### KU Leuven / Vrije Universiteit Brussel

- **Surface Water Hydrology** (2025–2026) — 2 semesters

### Universidad de Concepción

- **GIS Applied to Environmental Science** (2023)
- **Fluid Mechanics** (2022)
- **Advanced Hydrology** (2020)
- **Distributed Hydrology** (2020)
- **Hydrology** (2016–2018) — 5 semesters
- **Introduction to Environmental Science** (2015)

### Teaching Support

- Support Center for Learning Basic Sciences (2014–2015) — 4 semesters

---

## Student Supervision

| Student | Role | Project | Institution | Period |
|---------|------|---------|-------------|--------|
| Magali Ponds | PhD (co-supervisor) | Irrigation effects on glacier evolution in High-Mountain Asia | VUB | 2024–2027 |
| Maziar Freki | MSc (co-supervisor) | Closing regional water budget in Western Patagonia using SWOT data | VUB | 2024–2025 |
| Garance du Bus de Warnaffe | MSc (co-supervisor) | Time of emergence of glacier runoff in Patagonia | VUB | 2024–2025 |
| Francesco Calista | MSc (co-supervisor) | Glacier melt implications for water security in High-Mountain Asia | VUB | 2025–2026 |
| Fernanda Espinoza | MSc (co-supervisor) | Flood forecasting using deep learning in south-central Chile | UCH | 2025–2026 |
| Isadora Leon | MSc (co-supervisor) | Land cover effects on hydrological drought propagation | UACH | 2023–2024 |
| Paul Sandoval | BSc (supervisor) | Global warming impacts in the upper Manso River basin | UBB | 2021 |

---

## Short Courses & Workshops

- Integrative Assessment of Climate Change: Water Scarcity (CR2, 2021) — 60 hr
- Distributed Hydrological Modelling using TETIS (UDEC, 2021) — 24 hr
- Glaciology of the Southern Andes (IANIGLA, 2021) — 60 hr
- Advanced Course on Scientific Article Writing (Writewise, 2020) — 18 hr
- Remote Sensing Applied to Hydraulic Engineering (UDEC, 2017) — 10 hr

</div>
